case_title: HOUSE OF BRANHAM, INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS et al VS CUSTODIO, MARIA A. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $333.94 FILED BY HOUSE OF BRANHAM, INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS AND NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT CUSTODIO, MARIA A. GUERRERO, MARIA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM, INC. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS AND NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTODIO, MARIA A. GUERRERO, MARIA C. $333.94 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $396.44, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT GUERRERO, MARIA C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MARIA GUERRERO RETURNED FORWARD TIME EXPIRED.
